case_title: HURD, JANET M. VS KNOTT, WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HURD, JANET M. HEARING SET FOR MAR-17-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
CASE TO BE HEARD BY PAULINE SLOAN AT 8:30 AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HURD, JANET M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNOTT, WILLIAMS WORLD MOTORS $600.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLERK WAS ADVISED TO SEND A CERTIFIED COPY OF THE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR INSTEAD OF HAVING THE JUDGE SIGN THE ORDER(SCF 45)
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF MAR-17-1997, DENIED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY HURD, JANET M. AS TO DEFENDANT KNOTT, WILLIAMS WORLD MOTORS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO WILLIAM KNOTT IND/DBA WORLD MOTORS RETURNED SIGNED.
ORIGINAL JUDGMENT OF 1/30/97 NOT CHANGED.VEHICLE TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF DEFT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT KNOTT, WILLIAMS WORLD MOTORS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KNOTT, WILLIAMS WORLD MOTORS
